sources.note: Vital Records of Salem Marriages, Essex Inst. Pg 545
Family History Library, Salt Lake City, UT, Film # 0761210

notes: Catherine Richards. Born April 7, 1730 (christened same day). Recorded in Essex County, MA by 1750. Married Anthony (Jeminy) Gemeny on October 17, 1756 in Salem, MA. Three children: Mary F. (1769), John (1769, twins), Martha (1771-1790). Anthony died 1776. Catherine later married Ebenezer Aborn (1724-1789), who died 1789 in Massachusetts. Son John lost at sea c. 1804. Daughter Martha died before July 4, 1790. Death date unknown.
